column5: Concrete with COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and some red bricks. (FILL)

Weak to moderately weak, brownish grey, medium block size, fine to medium grained GRANITE, highly to moderately decomposed, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-65 degrees, 75 degrees-85 degrees.
Moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed GRANITE with widely to medium spaced joints.
Moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
Strong, pinkish grey spotted black, fine to medium to fairly coarse grained, slightly decomposed GRANITE.
